Title: CyberSource - Valid Form Submission
Preconditions:
- Checkout ready
- CyberSource configured
- Test card: 4622943127013705
Steps:
1. Select 'Bank card (CyberSource)'
2. Wait for form to load
3. Enter card: 4622943127013705
4. Enter name: John Smith
5. Enter expiry: 09/2029
6. Enter CVV: 838
7. Click 'Place order'
Expected Result:
- All fields accept input
- No validation errors
- Order attempts to process
- (May fail due to API - form validated)

Title: CyberSource - Special Chars in Name
Steps:
1. Enter name: Mary-Jane O'Connor
2. Fill valid card details
3. Submit
4. Test: José García
5. Test: Van Der Berg
6. Test: Smith Jr.
Expected Result:
- Hyphen accepted
- Apostrophe accepted
- Accented chars accepted
- Period accepted

Title: CyberSource - Expiry Format Variations
Steps:
1. Try format: 092029
2. Verify auto-format to 09 / 2029
3. Try: 09/2029
4. Try: 09 / 2029
Expected Result:
- All formats accepted
- Auto-formatting works
- MM / YYYY displayed

Title: CyberSource - Invalid Card Number
Steps:
1. Enter invalid card: 1234567890123456
2. Fill other fields
3. Submit
Expected Result:
- Validation error shown
- Error: Invalid card number
- Cannot submit

Title: CyberSource - Empty Card Number
Steps:
1. Leave card number empty
2. Fill other fields
3. Submit
Expected Result:
- Error: Card number required
- Field highlighted
- Cannot submit

Title: CyberSource - Empty Cardholder Name
Steps:
1. Fill card, expiry, CVV
2. Leave name empty
3. Submit
Expected Result:
- Validation error shown
- Error: Name required
- Cannot submit
NOTE: Bug found - form submits without name

Title: CyberSource - Expired Card
Steps:
1. Enter valid card number
2. Enter expired date: 01/2020
3. Fill other fields
4. Submit
Expected Result:
- Error: Card expired
- Cannot submit

Title: CyberSource - Empty Expiry
Steps:
1. Leave expiry empty
2. Fill other fields
3. Submit
Expected Result:
- Error: Expiry required
- Cannot submit

Title: CyberSource - Invalid Expiry Format
Steps:
1. Enter invalid expiry: 13/2029
2. Try: 00/2029
3. Try: 99/2029
4. Submit
Expected Result:
- Invalid months rejected
- Clear error message

Title: CyberSource - Invalid CVV Length
Steps:
1. Enter CVV: 12 (too short)
2. Try: 12345 (too long)
3. Submit
Expected Result:
- Error: CVV must be 3 digits
- Length validation enforced

Title: CyberSource - Empty CVV
Steps:
1. Fill all except CVV
2. Leave CVV empty
3. Submit
Expected Result:
- Error: CVV required
- Cannot submit

Title: CyberSource - Non-numeric CVV
Steps:
1. Try typing 'abc' in CVV
2. Try '8a8'
3. Verify rejection
Expected Result:
- Non-numeric rejected
- Only digits accepted

Title: CyberSource - Card Auto-Formatting
Steps:
1. Type card without spaces
2. Verify auto-spacing
3. Format: #### #### #### ####
Expected Result:
- Spaces inserted automatically
- Cursor position maintained

Title: CyberSource - Visa Detection
Steps:
1. Enter Visa card: 4622943127013705
2. Verify Visa icon highlights
Expected Result:
- Card type detected
- Visa icon shown
- Other icons dimmed

Title: CyberSource - CVV Masking
Steps:
1. Enter CVV: 838
2. Verify displayed as •••
Expected Result:
- CVV masked
- Security maintained

Title: Security - Card Number Iframe
Steps:
1. Open DevTools Elements
2. Find card number field
3. Verify in iframe
4. Check domain: testflex.cybersource.com
5. Try JS access: document.querySelector('iframe')
Expected Result:
- Field in secure iframe
- Cross-origin enforced
- Cannot access value from parent

Title: Security - CVV Iframe
Steps:
1. Inspect CVV field
2. Verify iframe implementation
3. Attempt JavaScript access
Expected Result:
- CVV in secure iframe
- Proper sandboxing
- Cannot access

Title: Security - No Card Data in Network
Preconditions:
- DevTools Network open
- CyberSource form ready
Steps:
1. Fill form with test card
2. Submit order
3. Inspect ALL network requests
4. Search for card number
5. Search for CVV
Expected Result:
- No raw card in requests
- No CVV in requests
- Only tokens/encrypted data
- CyberSource handles tokenization

Title: Security - No Data in Storage
Steps:
1. Fill card data
2. Submit order
3. Check localStorage
4. Check sessionStorage
5. Check cookies
Expected Result:
- No card number in storage
- No CVV stored
- Security best practices

Title: Security - HTTPS Only
Steps:
1. Check page URL (https)
2. Check iframe sources (https)
3. Check API calls (https)
4. Verify no mixed content
Expected Result:
- All HTTPS
- No mixed content warnings
- Secure connection

Title: Security - JWT Token Auth
Steps:
1. Inspect iframe source URLs
2. Look for JWT token
3. Verify token format
Expected Result:
- JWT present in iframe URL
- Three-part format
- Dynamic per session

Title: Payment Form - Field Labels

2. Verify placeholders

Title: Payment Form - Tab Order
Steps:
1. Tab through all fields
2. Verify logical order:
   Card → Name → Expiry → CVV

Expected Result:

Title: Payment Form - Load Time
Steps:
1. Select credit card payment
2. Measure time until form ready
3. Verify iframes load
Expected Result:
- Form loads within 2 seconds
- Iframes initialize
- User can interact quickly

Title: Double-Click Submit Prevention
Steps:
1. Fill valid payment form
2. Double-click 'Place Order' rapidly
3. Verify behavior
Expected Result:
- Only one order created
- Button disabled after click
- No duplicate charges
